scripts.prepublish:check: turbo run build check-types test lint && bun packages/scripts/preflight.ts && bun packages/scripts/reference-gate.ts
scripts.publish:dry: turbo run build check-types test lint && bun packages/scripts/preflight.ts --skip-changeset && bun packages/scripts/reference-gate.ts && bun packages/scripts/publish-packages.ts --dry-run
scripts.publish:local: turbo run build check-types test lint && bun packages/scripts/preflight.ts --skip-changeset && bun packages/scripts/reference-gate.ts && bun packages/scripts/publish-packages.ts --yes
